tickets.affected_task_title: BUG-013 — 生产环境 API URL 无 fallback，部署风险
tickets.description: Create frontend/lib/api/config.ts that exports apiUrl, throwing 'NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL is not configured' if the env var is absent. Replace the inline `process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL ?? 'http://localhost:8000'` pattern in all 5 api files (properties.ts, auth.ts, favorites.ts, admin.ts, health.ts) with an import from config.ts. No localhost:8000 strings may remain in any api file. tsc must pass.
tickets.verification: docker compose exec frontend npx tsc --noEmit, exit 0

tickets.affected_task_title: BUG-010 — Favorites 分页缺失 + ghost unfavorited
tickets.description: Fix three files: (1) favorites.ts: add getAllFavoriteIds() that loops through pages of page_size=50 until (page-1)*50 >= total, returns Set<string> of all favorited property ids. (2) search/page.tsx: replace getFavorites(1,100) with getAllFavoriteIds(); on failure silently degrade to empty Set, do not block search. (3) favorites/page.tsx: add page state (from URL ?page=, fallback 1), total state, PAGE_SIZE=12; sync page to URL with useRouter+useSearchParams; call getFavorites(page, PAGE_SIZE) and update total; add Previous/Next pagination UI below card grid, hide when totalPages<=1; on unfavorite: if remaining items > 1 refresh current page, if last item on non-first page go to page-1. No backend changes. tsc must pass.
tickets.verification: docker compose exec frontend npx tsc --noEmit, exit 0

tickets.affected_task_title: BUG-011 — Admin 房源列表无分页
tickets.description: Fix frontend/app/(dashboard)/admin/properties/page.tsx only. SCOPE EXPANDED 2026-05-25. (1) Add page state (default from URL ?page= param, fallback 1), total state (default 0), PAGE_SIZE=20. (2) Sync page state to URL searchParam (?page=N) using useRouter+useSearchParams; restore from URL on refresh. (3) fetchProperties accepts page param, calls propertiesApi.list(page, PAGE_SIZE), updates total; useEffect depends on page. (4) Add Previous/Next pagination UI below table; hide when totalPages<=1; totalPages=Math.ceil(total/PAGE_SIZE). (5) handleDelete: after delete, if current page had only 1 item and page>1, go to page-1 then refresh; otherwise refresh current page. (6) Fix Actions column overflow truncation: remove overflow-hidden from outer container, ensure Edit/Delete fully visible at any window width. (7) No other files. tsc must pass.
tickets.verification: docker compose exec frontend npx tsc --noEmit, exit 0

tickets.affected_task_title: BUG-016 — Root route / 显示 HealthPage 而非角色跳转
tickets.description: Fix root route / to redirect authenticated users by role instead of showing HealthPage. (1) middleware.ts: inside the existing if(session) block, add a check for pathname === '/' and redirect to getDefaultPage(role) using existing getRoleFromSession and getDefaultPage. (2) app/page.tsx: replace HealthPage content with a server component that calls redirect('/login') as a fallback. (3) NEW app/health/page.tsx: move the original HealthPage content here intact. Do not modify any other files. tsc must pass.
tickets.verification: docker compose exec frontend npx tsc --noEmit, exit 0
